channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Quality of Life & PROs
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Quality of Life & PROs

item.title: Comparison of endoscopy and mobile health index for ulcerative colitis.
item.description: Scandinavian journal of gastroenterology - At Haukeland University Hospital, the Mobile Health Index for Ulcerative Colitis (MHI-UC), a patient-reported outcome measure (PROM), is used in the outpatient clinic to detect disease activity in ...

item.title: Dietary inflammatory index and objective disease activity in IBD: no association found.
item.description: European journal of clinical nutrition - Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD) involves genetic and environmental factors, but the relationship between disease activity, adiposity, and diet remains unclear. To investigate the association betwe...
